description_long: This lantern features a robust, industrial-style metal head mounted on a sturdy wooden tripod stand. The lantern head is cylindrical with a slightly domed front, and it includes a handle on top for easy repositioning. The tripod legs are made of wood with visible grain, connected by metal braces for stability. The front of the lantern is fitted with a circular glass lens, while the rear has a metallic housing with a small access panel. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage studio or searchlight lamps, blending utilitarian function with decorative appeal. The materials and construction suggest it is suitable for outdoor or urban environments, such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A vintage industrial lantern with a metal head and glass lens, mounted on a wooden tripod stand with metal braces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular glass lens and the symmetrical tripod legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical metal head, handle, and the profile of the tripod legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the metallic housing with an access panel and the converging tripod legs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the handle, the side profile of the lantern head, and the tripod structure.
